meta.description: Starter theme in the Hello Elementor style with posts, categories, tags, and search templates.

siteLogo.label: Site logo
siteLogo.description: Leave empty to use the site logo from admin (systemLogo)

displayTitle.label: Site title
displayTitle.description: Leave empty to use the site title from admin (systemTitle)

displayTagline.label: Site tagline
displayTagline.description: Leave empty to use the site tagline from admin (systemSubTitle)

darkMode.label: Enable dark mode
darkMode.description: Uses dark background and light text when enabled

backgroundImage.label: Background image
backgroundImage.description: Overrides solid background when set (visible on wide screens)
